name: IRC_CAND_DUP_CHECK_DETAILS
description: This table stores the details of duplicate candidates found in the system for a Candidate.

columns.Name: DUP_CHK_RESULTS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Reference PersonId . This is the candidate on whom dup check is being run. Foreign key to irc_candidates.

columns.Name: DUP_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Reference PersonId . This is the candidate which was returned as a duplicate of the PERSON_ID. Foreign key to irc_candidates.

columns.Name: NID_MATCH
columns.Comments: Indicates whether there was a NID match between reference candidate and the duplicate candidate.

columns.Name: DOB_MATCH
columns.Comments: Indicates whether there was a DOB match between reference candidate and the duplicate candidate.

columns.Name: GROUP_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the Group Code against which the candidate and duplicate candidate were matched upon. It can contain any of the following values : HH for NID match, Hx for all High matches, Mx for all Medium matches and Lx for all Low matches.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
